text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, should I go for this one? Or<n>maybe this
one?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh, Sweep. Here for some reading?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Perfect timing, Rob Roy! Know any<n>names of
some really yucky herbal<n>plants?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yucky herbal plants? Why would you<n>want to
know about something like<n>that?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
N-no reason. I'm just curious... So do<n>you know
any?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Hmm, well... I would say senburiis known to be particularly bitter.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Senburi, got it! That might just work. ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Um... Where are you going, Sweep?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Uhm, according to my grandma's<n>ancient
encyclopedia of wild herbs<n>and flowers... Senburi
grows in sunny<n>places and has long, thin
leaves...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Are you perhaps searching for<n>senburi? But
why?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you wanna know? Well, guess<n>what? I'm
gonna pull a prank on Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
A prank?! I-I don't think that's a<n>good idea! You
better stop!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No way! She deserves it! She made<n>me eat
veggies the other day, so I'm<n>gonna teach her a
lesson!
Now that's an intriguing story. Andjust who will be taught thislesson, exactly?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That meanie dorm leader, duh! She'salways bullying me and telling mewhat to do! Well, I'll show her!
Meanie dorm leader, you say?<n>Interesting.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear. Oh dear, oh dear... Sweep, I<n>think you
should stop no—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! ♪ Let's see how she likesthis super bitter herbal drink. I can'twait to see how ugly the face shemakes is!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Who knows... Perhaps she'll make a<n>face... like
this?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, stop! That's so fun...ny...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Eeeeek! Why, just why?! What are<n>you doing
here, Fuji?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What now... I know! You there! Give<n>me some
kind of excuse!
choice_data_list:
You only had Fuji Kiseki's best intentions in
mind, right?!

You only had Fuji Kiseki's best intentions in
mind, right?!
You should be honest and apologize.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What now... I know! You there! Give<n>me some
kind of excuse!
choice_data_list:
You only had Fuji Kiseki's best intentions in
mind, right?!

You only had Fuji Kiseki's best intentions in
mind, right?!
You should be honest and apologize.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, that's it! I was looking for<n>medicinal
plants so you can stay<n>healthy, Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So that was your intention. Herbal<n>plants to keep
me in good health. Your<n>kindness pleases me.
However...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It would be such a waste for me to<n>enjoy this on
my own. Sweep, you<n>should have some with me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If this herb will make you healthy, as<n>you say,
then I wish for the both of us<n>to be in good
health. How's that?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: W-well, uh... I haven't even found<n>any ye—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Where art thou, senburi? Ah,<n>doth mine
eyes deceive me? Yes, I do<n>believe I've found
some.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No way, already?! Ew, ew, ewww!<n>I'm not
drinking any!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, now now, let's have somefun, shall we? Perhaps we can have alittle senburi-infused tea party.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Noooo! Why are you so into this<n>anyway?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
If Sweep is a witch, then Fuji's a<n>grand
sorceress...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I shall give you a treat if you<n>apologize
like a good little witch.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wait, really?! But... what kind of treat?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You'll find out after you apologize.<n>Well, what do
you say?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Grrrr... fine. I just have to apologize,<n>right? If
that's what you want.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That wasn't so bad, was it? I think<n>this good little
witch deserves a treat.<n>Could everyone come
along too?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I've got a nutrient-rich cake filled with<n>lots of
sweet, fluffy cream! Go on,<n>have a bite!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yaaaay, cake! Hehe, don't mind if I<n>do! ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much for giving me a<n>piece. How
intriguing. Tell me, how did<n>you fit so many
nutrients in one<n>serving—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oho, have you figured out the secret?<n>Let's
just... keep this a secret from<n>Sweep.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
So I was right... The main ingredient<n>must be
vegetables. If Sweep is a<n>witch, then Fuji must
be a grand<n>sorceress...
